title: Pukka Pad, Reporter’s Pad 3 Pack for Home, School, and Office – 14 x 20.5cm – Wirebound, Head-Bound Notebook with 160 Pages of 80GSM Paper – Microperforated for Easy Removal – Blue
features: Amazing Multipack: The Pukka Pad Reporter’s Pad come in sets of three with fashionable metallic colours so stay stylish while you organise your writing
Become Error-Proof: Introducing spell check without the computer; these notepads feature a page of 250 commonly misspelt English words to make sure you don’t make mistakes

Perfect On the Go: If you’re on the go, reporter’s pads are the perfect notebooks for you, providing a hardback for you to write on as well as mico-perforation allowing you to tear and take your notes anywhere

FSC Certified: These notebooks are FSC certified, ensuring that the products have been sourced from responsibly managed forests as outlined by the non-profit Forest Stewardship Council, dedicated to environmentally and socially conscious production standards
High-Quality Paper: Each pad features 160 pages of premium 80GSM paper to prevent ghosting and bleeding through on the next page, perfect for school subjects, home organization, and work projects
description: From the manufacturer Premium Quality No Bleed Paper These notebooks use superior quality, bright, 80 GSM paper, allowing you to use a variety of pens without bleeding, ghosting, or leaking through to the other side. Page Perforation Each book features pages that tear out easily along the perforated lines, great leaving important memos around the house or taking your grocery lists to the store Durable Twin Binding These sturdy, stylish, and versatile notebooks include durable twin binding and are fantastic for organizing work projects, course work, or event planning.
